definitions.text: The period of time that has already happened, in contrast to the present and the future.
examples: a book about a time machine that can transport people back into the past

definitions.text: Having already happened; in the past; finished. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
Following expressions of time to indicate how long ago something happened; ago.
Of a period of time: having just gone by; previous.
Any number of minutes after the last hour.
examples: What's the time? - It's now quarter past twelve midday (or 12.15pm) -O,K., we'll stop at half (past) twelve
I'm past caring what he thinks of me.

definitions.text: simple past and past participle of pass
